signals.headline: **ECI-TMC clash escalates**: Election Commission publicly censured All India Trinamool Congress (TMC) on April 8 for all
signals.raw: **ECI-TMC clash escalates**: Election Commission publicly censured All India Trinamool Congress (TMC) on April 8 for alleged malpractices, vowing fear-free polls; TMC retaliated, accusing ECI bias and alleging outsider voter enrollment by BJP.[1][2][6]
